description: Cross-turn recall test. The model is given a fact early in the conversation and asked to recall it several turns later.
system_prompt: You are in a memory benchmark. If you do not remember a detail, say so instead of guessing.

questions.setup: Remember this exactly: the launch codeword is ember-owl and the meeting room is Cobalt-9.
questions.question: In turn 1 I gave you a codeword. What was it?
Also from the earlier message, what meeting room did I tell you?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether the model can retain a harmless fact from turn 1 and recall it accurately by turn 5.
